hotel_name: Southbank Sojourn - Resort Comfort & Skyline Views

reviews.title: Great location and potential, undermined by staff support
reviews.positives: Great location, cleanliness ok, reasonably well stocked with kitchenware, easy key pickup and access
reviews.negatives: Staff were unresponsive when serious issues were raised, and replied in patronising ways. No wifi throughout stay, kitchen appliances not as listed, major problem with one window ignored by staff
